title: 阿里巴巴集团 —— 编排者 BMC
contentDateLabel: 2024 年(蚂蚁暂停后,生态成熟期)

description.en: Single ecosystem BMC capturing Alibaba Group as the orchestrator of multiple sub-businesses (Alibaba.com B2B, Taobao C2C, Tmall B2C, AliExpress cross-border, Alipay/Ant payments, Cainiao logistics, Alibaba Cloud, DAMO research). Customer Segments split into multiple platform sides; Revenue Streams aggregate across marketplace commissions, advertising fees, financial services, and Cloud SaaS. The orchestrator role is the value the group adds beyond what any single sub-business could deliver alone.
description.zh: 单张生态 BMC 捕获阿里巴巴集团作为多个子业务编排者的角色(Alibaba.com B2B、淘宝 C2C、天猫 B2C、AliExpress 跨境、支付宝 / 蚂蚁支付、菜鸟物流、阿里云、达摩院研发)。客户细分划分为多个平台侧;收入来源横跨市场佣金、广告费、金融服务、云 SaaS。编排者角色是集团在「任何单一子业务靠自己达不到」的层面上所添加的价值。
